recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
recommendations.overview: Mumbai, India, November 26, 2008. While several terrorists spread hatred and death through the city, others attack the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Both hotel staff and guests risk their lives, making unthinkable sacrifices to protect themselves and keep

recommendations.title: Grand Hotel
recommendations.overview: Guests at a posh Berlin hotel struggle through worry, scandal, and heartache.

recommendations.title: The Happiness of the Katakuris
recommendations.overview: The Katakuri family has just opened their guest house in the mountains. Unfortunately their first guest commits suicide and in order to avoid trouble they decide to bury him in the backyard. Things get way more complicated when their second guest, a

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Hotel Desire
recommendations.overview: Antonia is a single mother who works as a hotel maid in Berlin. A normal hot summer day takes a dramatic turn when she crosses paths with a particular guest of the hotel, famous blind portrait painter Julius Pass.

recommendations.title: Class of Nuke 'Em High
recommendations.overview: The pupils at a high school next to a nuclear power plant start acting and looking strange after buying contaminated drugs from a plant worker.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: That Christmas
recommendations.overview: It's an unforgettable Christmas for the townsfolk of Wellington-on-Sea when the worst snowstorm in history alters everyone's plans — including Santa's.

recommendations.title: Angry Annie
recommendations.overview: Annie becomes pregnant. Since she doesn't want to keep the child, she meets a movement that performs illegal abortions. But, in the seventies, Annie will encounter allies and opponents along the way.

recommendations.title: The Restaurant
recommendations.overview: A great French restaurant's owner, Monsieur Septime, is thrust into intrigue and crime, when one of his famous guests disappears.
